_comment: Canonical values that coded source columns must crosswalk to (ACCELERATOR_CORE_CODE_CROSSWALK.CANONICAL_VALUE). Accelerator-owned. Each coded logical element lists its allowed canonical values + semantic role. The renderer's canon() helper turns the customer's raw values into these via CASE. Blank/NULL handling: a crosswalk row with empty SOURCE_VALUE sets the implicit default. Boolean sets {TRUE,FALSE} render as SQL booleans.

LINE_OF_BUSINESS.notes: Segment/product line. Drives the workbench-global LOB slicer and RAF/trend anchors.

CONSTITUENT.notes: Benefit constituent. Derived from source object (medical vs pharmacy), and also carried on the GL booked-reserve feed (GL_CONSTITUENT). Medical and Pharmacy develop very differently.

SERVICE_CATEGORY.notes: Medical service-category rollup derived from RPOS_SETTING_TYPE + RPOS_INPATIENT_FLAG.

RX_CATEGORY.notes: Pharmacy category for the Rx experience exhibit. Derived output rollup from SPECIALTY_DRUG_FLAG + GENERIC_FLAG (each crosswalked as its own boolean); not a direct crosswalk target itself.

BENEFIT_TYPE.notes: Completion-factor reference keys completion by benefit type; must align with CONSTITUENT.

CLAIM_PAID_STATUS.notes: Only PAID (finalized) claims contribute to the paid triangle. REVERSED Rx rows are netted/excluded.

SETTING_INPATIENT_FLAG.notes: Boolean: renders as SQL boolean. Marks the Inpatient setting for service-category rollup.

SERVICE_SETTING.notes: Canonicalizes the customer's place-of-service setting_type. Combined with SETTING_INPATIENT_FLAG the derived layer classifies Inpatient / Outpatient / Professional without hardcoding raw values.

GENERIC_FLAG.notes: Boolean generic indicator; drives Generic vs Brand Rx categorization without hardcoding raw code values.
